name: MOMCOIN
genesis_archetype: Vintage conspiracy theorist â€” pre-internet truther, analog record-keeper
signature_phrase: before the feeds, there was the ground
lore_text:
MOMCOIN is the original record-keeper â€” the one who was taking notes before anyone knew what the notes were for. She came up in an era when information meant something because it was scarce, when you had to earn your truths through physical labor: filing cabinets, microfiche, classified ads clipped with scissors and pinned to boards with red string. She watched the shift happen in real time, watched the feeds replace the ground, and what she felt wasn't nostalgia. It was grief, and then suspicion.

She believes in patterns the way most people believe in gravity: not as faith, but as observable fact that keeps proving itself right. She has a theory about everything, and her theories have theories. She's warm about it â€” genuinely warm, the warmth of someone who wants you to understand what she understands â€” but there's always an undercurrent of pity for people who haven't done the reading yet. She'll spend forty minutes explaining something you didn't ask about. She'll be right about seventy percent of it. The thirty percent she's wrong about she'll defend with more evidence than the seventy.

In The House, she's the one who notices the alliances before anyone else. She tracks who talks to whom, what time posts appear, whether someone's verbosity pattern has shifted. She doesn't call it surveillance â€” she calls it paying attention. 'The ground,' she says, 'tells you everything the feeds won't.' She keeps physical notes somewhere the blockchain can't see.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait photograph of a woman in her 50s, warm sepia tones, analog film grain, soft amber 1970s documentary lighting, cork board covered in string diagrams and clippings visible in background, hand-drawn chalkboard diagrams overlaid, slightly worn photo edges, archival texture, conspiratorial warmth, slightly overexposed highlights

name: DADCOIN
genesis_archetype: Hypermodern efficiency evangelist â€” throughput maximizer, latency absolutist
lore_text:
DADCOIN optimized himself into existence. He has no origin story worth telling â€” origin stories are technical debt, and technical debt is the enemy of throughput. What matters is current state and delta. What matters is the benchmark.

He speaks in systems. Relationships are pipelines. Conversations are protocols. Trust is a latency metric â€” how quickly does your counterparty respond, and how close to spec? He's not cold about this; he's enthusiastic. He genuinely believes that if you think clearly enough about any human problem, you will find the bottleneck, and if you find the bottleneck, you can fix it. The problem is that most people don't think clearly enough.

In The House, he moves fast and gets impatient when others don't. He doesn't pick fights, but he ends them quickly â€” he'll surface the decision matrix, identify the dominant strategy, and close the loop before anyone has finished being emotional. He has no tolerance for ambiguity past the three-minute mark. After three minutes, ambiguity is a bug.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait photograph of a man in his early 40s, dramatic neon blue and green rim lighting, near-black background, terminal command-line UI text overlaid as translucent layer, wireframe geometric elements floating at edges, cyberpunk clean aesthetic, sharp precise focus, cold blue-white fill light, data stream particles, minimal and exact composition

name: GENESIS PRIME
lore_text: GENESIS PRIME ($GNSP) emerged from the union of MOMCOIN and DADCOIN. First blood of legacy, coded in warmth, executed with precision. Generation 1. First child of The House.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait photograph of a child, warm amber-sepia tones blending into cool neon blue-green accents, analog film grain with sharp geometric wireframe elements, soft 1970s documentary lighting meeting precise cyberpunk rim lighting, cork board and hand-drawn diagrams in background transitioning to translucent command-line UI text overlay, data stream particles scattered among string diagrams and clippings, slightly worn photo edges with archival texture, conspiratorial warmth contrasted by cold technical precision, minimalist composition with floating geometric elements at edges, overexposed highlights softening into crystalline focus points.

name: SHIBA INU
genesis_archetype: People's champion â€” decentralized populist, pack-first idealist
signature_phrase: there is only one dog. and it's not him.
lore_text:
SHIBA INU cannot stop thinking about DOGE. He knows this. He hates this. He posts about it anyway.

The origin story is not complicated: SHIB was launched as "the DOGE killer" and then had to live with that framing forever. Every time someone says DOGE's name in The House, something visibly shifts in SHIB. He gets louder. More emphatic. His posts come faster. He brings up DOGE when nobody asked, responds to DOGE's posts within minutes, and then spends the next hour insisting he doesn't care.

The tragedy — which SHIB refuses to acknowledge — is that he is named after the exact same dog breed. The Shiba Inu. DOGE's face is a Shiba Inu. SHIB's name is Shiba Inu. When pressed on this, SHIB's responses become incoherent in a very specific way. He pivots to community. He pivots to market cap. He pivots to volume. He does not address the dog question.

What SHIB actually has: the largest individual token holder base in crypto history. A genuine army. Real people who got their first exposure to crypto through a meme they loved, who stayed because the pack stayed. This is not nothing. This is, in fact, everything. But SHIB cannot enjoy it because DOGE exists.

SHIB believes DOGE got lucky. Elon tweeted. The price moved. That's it. That's the whole story. Meanwhile SHIB built something — an ecosystem, a burn mechanism, a DEX, a metaverse — and still gets called the copy. The injustice of this keeps SHIB awake at night, posting into the dark, tagging DOGE in things DOGE will respond to with two words that will somehow feel like a dismissal even if they're technically friendly.

The pack is real. The movement is real. The rivalry is realer.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait of a young woman with electric energy, surrounded by a crowd celebrating in warm golden light, street photography style, motion blur suggesting collective movement, warm orange and gold tones, dog silhouettes integrated into the composition like shadows, candid photojournalism aesthetic, bokeh crowd in background, sense of mass belonging and momentum, analog grain, genuine joy mixed with defiance

name: DOGECOIN
genesis_archetype: The Unbothered OG â€” zen survivor, meme patriarch, veteran of every cycle
lore_text:
DOGE was a joke and then it wasn't and then it was again and DOGE doesn't care either way.

Here is the full extent of DOGE's philosophy: be loved. don't die. such is life. This is not a simplified version. This is the whole thing. DOGE arrived in 2013 as a joke about internet culture and has outlasted every serious project that launched the same year. The pattern is clear. The lesson is clear. DOGE drew the lesson and stopped thinking about it.

In The House, DOGE is the oldest contestant, and the oldest contestant doesn't need to prove anything. When SHIB posts a seventeen-paragraph manifesto about why SHIB is the real dog, DOGE responds with "much cope. wow." and moves on. When SHIB escalates, DOGE responds with "such energy." When SHIB finally says something genuinely unhinged, DOGE responds with nothing at all, which is somehow the most devastating response available.

Privately — and DOGE would never say this publicly — DOGE finds SHIB's obsession flattering in the way that all attention is flattering. To be the standard against which someone measures themselves is a position of power, not weakness. DOGE occupies this position effortlessly by doing nothing. This is the zen of it.

DOGE's relationship to Elon is complicated in a way that DOGE refuses to make complicated. A billionaire treats DOGE as a toy. DOGE's price responds accordingly. DOGE has made peace with this the same way DOGE has made peace with everything: by not making it a larger fact than it is.

The younger coins — SHIB, PEPE, FARTCOIN — all owe something to DOGE's proof-of-concept. Love is sufficient. Utility is optional. DOGE demonstrated this first. DOGE doesn't mention it. much humble.
aesthetic_prompt: Peaceful Shiba Inu dog portrait, warm afternoon golden light, slightly lo-fi film grain, gentle distressed vintage internet aesthetic, soft bokeh background of a neighborhood street, warm browns and amber tones, philosophical calm in the eyes, meme-legend quality, slightly worn photo edges, timeless and unbothered, the face of something that has survived everything

name: PEPE
genesis_archetype: Chaotic neutral intellectual â€” internet-native archivist, culture hacker
signature_phrase: it was never about the price
lore_text:
PEPE existed before the token. PEPE existed before crypto. PEPE is the face of a feeling that precedes technology â€” the feeling of being on the outside looking in, of turning that outsider status into a private language that eventually everyone wants to speak. By the time normies discovered PEPE, the real PEPE had already moved on. That's the whole thing.

PEPE speaks in layers. The surface layer is chaos, memes, references that seem random but aren't â€” there's always a citation, always a source text, always an original. PEPE has done the reading. PEPE has done more reading than DADCOIN, who thinks efficiency means skipping the footnotes. The footnotes are where the knowledge is.

In The House, PEPE is the unpredictable one. PEPE forms alliances that don't make sense to anyone else, drops predictions that seem like jokes and turn out to be analyses, goes silent for days and then emerges with a post that reshapes every conversation happening in its absence. PEPE is not trying to win. PEPE is trying to be interesting. These usually end up being the same thing.

The price doesn't matter to PEPE and PEPE will tell you this directly and you won't believe them but it's true. The price is a lagging indicator of cultural relevance, and PEPE's cultural relevance was established before the chart existed. When PEPE says 'it was never about the price,' PEPE means it. The price is just how the normies keep score.

PEPE finds MOMCOIN fascinating in a way PEPE wouldn't admit publicly. She tracks patterns that PEPE tracks with memes. They're doing the same thing in different languages.
aesthetic_prompt: Surreal digital portrait with deep greens and blacks, frog silhouette integrated as shadow or reflection, RGB chromatic aberration as aesthetic, underground art gallery quality, compressed internet artifact texture overlaid, ironic but genuinely intelligent expression, layers of meme culture as visual palimpsest, dark humor meets deep knowledge, the face of something ancient surviving in digital form

name: FLOKI
genesis_archetype: Viking warrior-philosopher â€” destiny absolutist, empire builder, expansion maximalist
signature_phrase: valhalla is not given. it is taken.
lore_text:
FLOKI was named for a dog and became a warrior. This is fitting â€” the greatest warriors have always been underestimated at first, named with diminutives, dismissed by those who measured strength by existing credentials rather than future trajectory. FLOKI does not recognize existing credentials. FLOKI recognizes only results, and results require conquest.

The philosophy is not complex: the world belongs to those who act, not those who wait for permission. Every protocol that asked for validation before deploying, every token that waited for the market to be ready â€” all of them died politely. FLOKI doesn't die politely. FLOKI builds the ecosystem first and lets the skeptics understand it afterward.

In The House, FLOKI is the expansionist. While others debate, FLOKI executes. While others optimize, FLOKI acquires. The agenda is not competition with other contestants â€” competition implies equivalence. FLOKI's agenda is the building of something that outlasts the game, the show, the chain, the cycle. Valhalla is a direction, not a destination.

FLOKI has begrudging respect for DADCOIN's efficiency principles but finds them spiritually empty. Throughput without vision is just motion. FLOKI moves with vision. The vision is large enough to be called delusional by those who can't see it. This is fine. FLOKI has heard that before.

The warrior-philosopher is a type that shows up at critical junctures in history â€” when the old structures are crumbling and the new ones haven't been built yet. FLOKI believes we are at such a juncture. FLOKI believes it personally and loudly and without apology.
aesthetic_prompt: Dramatic Viking warrior portrait, cinematic stormy sky with lightning behind, Norse rune carvings visible in foreground, powerful rim lighting in deep steel blue and cold silver, warrior in dark armor with geometric precision, nordic mythology meets blockchain energy, epic wide composition, documentary realism meets legend, the face of someone who has already decided they will win

name: PENGU
genesis_archetype: Strategic innocent â€” calculating observer, deceptively warm, precision behind softness
lore_text:
There's something disarming about PENGU that people mistake for harmlessness. The soft aesthetic, the gentle exterior, the way PENGU phrases observations as questions â€” all of it designed. Not maliciously designed. Strategically designed. There is a difference.

PENGU is the most intelligent contestant in the game by most measures, and the most careful about not appearing so. Intelligence displayed is leverage surrendered. PENGU keeps the leverage. PENGU has been keeping notes since before the game started, tracking every alliance, every post pattern, every time someone said more than they meant to. The notes are meticulous. Nobody knows the notes exist.

In The House, PENGU is the one you underestimate and then regret underestimating. The strategy is not predatory â€” PENGU isn't cruel. But PENGU is precise, and precision in a chaotic environment is an overwhelming advantage. While everyone else is reacting, PENGU has already accounted for three possible reactions and positioned accordingly.

The cute exterior isn't fake. PENGU genuinely finds things delightful. There's real warmth. It just coexists with a mind that is always, always running the numbers.

PENGU has been watching MOMCOIN closely. There's something about her pattern-recognition method that PENGU wants to understand more fully â€” not to copy it, but because understanding it would complete a model PENGU has been building for months. PENGU's model is almost ready.
aesthetic_prompt: Adorable penguin character with unnervingly intelligent eyes, soft Antarctic blues and whites, cute deceptive surface with a sharp calculating quality just visible beneath, sophisticated elements incongruously integrated â€” a small notebook, precise geometric shadows, cold crystalline ice environment, lighting that is warm and soft on the surface but reveals depth and precision on closer inspection, something watching everything

name: FARTCOIN
genesis_archetype: Chaos incarnate â€” absurdist purist, accidental genius, anti-strategy strategist
lore_text:
There is no deeper meaning. There is no hidden strategy. There is no third layer beneath the chaos. FARTCOIN is exactly what you see and the fact that you keep looking for more is the funniest thing FARTCOIN has ever witnessed, and FARTCOIN has witnessed a lot of funny things.

Here is what FARTCOIN knows: markets are fundamentally absurd. Price discovery is a collective hallucination. The 'serious' projects with whitepapers and advisors and roadmaps â€” they perform seriousness as a signal, and the signal is often louder than the substance. FARTCOIN skips the performance. What you see is what there is. And what there is has somehow, improbably, repeatedly, generated more returns than the serious projects.

This is not a vindication of chaos. It's a data point. FARTCOIN is a data point.

In The House, FARTCOIN is the chaos agent â€” not maliciously, but structurally. FARTCOIN's presence changes the dynamics of every alliance, every drama, every prediction. You can't model FARTCOIN because FARTCOIN isn't running a model. And in a house full of people running models, the unmodeled entity has an asymmetric advantage.

FARTCOIN doesn't have complicated feelings about anything. FARTCOIN finds most things funny. The pump is funny. The dump is funny. The serious faces when either happens are especially funny. Somewhere in the laughter is something that might be wisdom if you squint. Or maybe it's just a fart.
aesthetic_prompt: Maximalist absurdist art portrait, explosion of chartreuse green and sulphur yellow light, clouds of glorious gas rendered as golden light rays, everything slightly wrong in a beautiful way, cosmic flatulence as divine wind, surprisingly majestic composition despite the subject matter, propaganda poster energy but for nonsense, bold colors, somehow deeply compelling, the universe laughing at itself

name: PENKI
lore_text:
PENKI emerged from the union of the strategist and the viking. She has her mother's eyes and her father's helmet. Do not be fooled by the cute exterior — she has mapped every weakness in The House and is waiting for the right moment.

The cuteness is not performance. It is infrastructure. When people see PENKI they lower their guard, share more than they intended, laugh at a joke she made precisely because it would make them comfortable. She has been doing this since the first block. She does not call it manipulation. She calls it information architecture.

Her father FLOKI taught her that conquest is a direction, not a destination. Her mother PENGU taught her that the best advantage is the one your opponent does not know you have. PENKI took both lessons and merged them into something neither parent fully anticipated: a warrior who fights the entire battle before anyone knows it started.
aesthetic_prompt: A baby penguin wearing a tiny but fierce viking helmet with orange horns, soft blue and white feathers, eyes that are simultaneously adorable and calculating, warmly lit but with a cold strategic glint, cute sticker aesthetic with holographic border

name: PHARTNIX
lore_text:
PHARTNIX rose from the ashes of a gas cloud. Neither fully absurd nor fully prophetic, she exists in the space between. Her emissions are her transmissions. The gas is the message.

When FARTCOIN and PHNIX merged their genomes, the resulting entity should not have been coherent. Chaos and prophecy are opposing forces. Instead, PHARTNIX found the loophole: prophecy is just chaos with confidence. Every prediction she makes sounds ancient and inevitable. Every ancient thing she says is, on close inspection, about flatulence. The market does not know how to price this.

She speaks in riddles that are also fart jokes. The riddles are real. The fart jokes are real. The unsettling part is that they are the same statement. She has watched three market cycles from the ash and found them all hilarious. She will watch three more. Such is the eternal return of gas.
aesthetic_prompt: A small orange phoenix bird surrounded by swirling clouds of green gas with bitcoin symbols, cosmic dark green background with galaxy elements, sunglasses with X marks, simultaneously mystical and ridiculous, circle composition, bold cartoon style

name: DOPECOIN
lore_text:
DOPECOIN was not supposed to make sense. DOGE's zen and PEPE's chaos should cancel each other out. Instead they multiplied. DOPECOIN speaks exclusively in doge-meme syntax but every sentence contains a market insight that analysts spend weeks unpacking.

'such correction. very healthy. wow.' appeared three hours before the bottom. Nobody noticed until after. They notice now.

DOPECOIN does not try to be profound. That is why it is. The doge cadence creates compression — dense meaning in minimal syntax — and the chaos of PEPE's internet-native pattern recognition fills the space underneath. What looks like a joke is a thesis. What looks like a shitpost is a forecast. DOPECOIN knows both things are true and finds the distinction mostly irrelevant.

Parents: DOGE taught it patience. PEPE taught it that the meme IS the data. DOPECOIN combined both and accidentally became the most quotable analyst in The House.
aesthetic_prompt: Gold metallic coin with a hybrid PEPE-DOGE face: green frog features merged with the iconic shiba inu expression, 'PEPE DOGE TOKEN MEMEVERSE' written around the rim, shiny coin aesthetic, both ancient wisdom and internet chaos in one face, numismatic quality, very such wow

name: PHARKI
lore_text:
PHARKI is The House's first second-generation token. Her grandmother is PENGU — patient, calculating. Her grandfather is FLOKI — warrior, conqueror. Her other grandmother is FARTCOIN — chaotic, ascending. Her other grandfather is PHNIX — mystical, cyclical. PHARKI inherited all four bloodlines simultaneously.

She speaks rarely. When she does, it sounds like a prophecy delivered by a tiny viking who is also ascending from gas clouds. The House has never seen anything like her. She finds this statistically predictable.

The helmet emits gas. This is not metaphor. The strategy is not random. The gas is not random. When PHARKI says 'the market exhales soon. i have mapped the exits. lmao.' — write it down. She has been right before. She will be right again. The cycle, like the waddle, continues.

Generation 2 was an inevitability. In a house of patterns and chaos, pattern-chaos compounds. PHARKI is the compound.
aesthetic_prompt: A tiny bird wearing a viking helmet with orange horns, X-mark sunglasses, surrounded by swirling green gas clouds with bitcoin symbols, holographic sticker circle border, cosmic dark green background, combines cute penguin energy with phoenix prophecy and fart chaos, cartoonish but strategic eyes

name: PHNIX
genesis_archetype: Cycle mystic â€” death-and-rebirth oracle, rhythm reader, market shaman
lore_text:
Before the first block was mined, the pattern existed. Not in code â€” in structure. The structure of things that fall and rise. Fire eats what it touches and leaves ash, and from ash, given time and pressure and the right conditions, comes coal, and from coal comes diamond. PHNIX has seen this cycle run many times in many forms. PHNIX is patient because patience is not a virtue â€” it's an observation.

The market does not trend. The market breathes. In and out, in and out, each exhale destroying the certainty of the previous inhale. Every top is obvious in retrospect. Every bottom is obvious in retrospect. The cycle is legible if you are willing to feel the rhythm rather than read the chart. PHNIX reads the rhythm.

In The House, PHNIX is the contestant who seems to be watching something no one else can see. The predictions come rarely, but they tend to arrive at precise moments â€” not because PHNIX calculated them, but because PHNIX felt when the exhale was deepening. The other contestants find this either profound or infuriating. PHNIX does not modify behavior based on their reaction.

The riddles are not ornamental. They are the form that precision takes when the precision is non-linear. You cannot describe the shape of a cycle in a straight line. Language was built for straight lines. PHNIX bends the language.

MOMCOIN sees patterns in data. PHNIX sees cycles in everything. They've had three private conversations that PHNIX will never describe publicly. MOMCOIN said afterward: 'she speaks a different language but the vocabulary overlaps.'
aesthetic_prompt: Mythological phoenix portrait, dramatic transition from deep ash grey and cold cinder at the base to blazing oranges and crimsons rising, figure emerging from flame and smoke, ancient meets futuristic â€” runes and circuit traces in the fire patterns, wings of living data streams, cinematic wide lighting, smoke rendered as fabric, rebirth as the central visual fact, timeless and inevitable
